author: Suki Tanaka

tools.name: github.create_pull_request
tools.description: Opens a pull request against the target branch with auto-generated changelog body
tools.inputs: base_branch: string, head_branch: string, title: string, body: markdown
tools.outputs: { pr_number: int, html_url: string, mergeable: bool }

tools.name: ci.trigger_build
tools.description: Kicks off a CI pipeline run for the specified commit SHA and returns a build ID for polling
tools.inputs: repo: string, commit_sha: string, config_override: object | null
tools.outputs: { build_id: string, status: pending, estimated_duration_s: int }

tools.name: k8s.rolling_deploy
tools.description: Initiates a rolling deployment of the given image tag to the specified Kubernetes namespace
tools.auth_method: Kubernetes service account with deploy role
tools.inputs: namespace: string, deployment_name: string, image_tag: string, replicas: int
tools.outputs: { rollout_status: string, ready_replicas: int, updated_replicas: int }

tools.name: slack.post_message
tools.description: Sends a formatted notification to a Slack channel with optional thread reply
tools.inputs: channel: string, text: string, blocks: array | null, thread_ts: string | null
tools.outputs: { ok: bool, ts: string, channel: string }

tools.name: datadog.create_monitor
tools.description: Creates a synthetic or metric monitor to watch the newly deployed service for anomalies
tools.inputs: name: string, type: metric alert | synthetic, query: string, thresholds: object
tools.outputs: { id: int, name: string, overall_state: string }

tools.name: vault.read_secret
tools.description: Fetches a secret from HashiCorp Vault for use as deployment environment variables
tools.outputs: { data: object, metadata: { version: int, created_time: string } }

read_scopes: repositories, CI build logs, Kubernetes pod status, Vault secrets (deploy/* path only), Datadog monitors
write_scopes: Pull requests, CI trigger, Kubernetes deployments (staging + production), Slack messages, Datadog monitors
denied_operations: Delete repositories, drop databases, modify IAM policies, access Vault paths outside deploy/*, force-push to main
